**Sprint:** Sprint 2. Analytics And Metrics Framework
**Objective:** Develop the analytics and metrics framework to support operational and strategic decision-making.

Develop the operational metrics framework, including key performance indicators (KPIs) and metrics for call center and patient access operations.
